scripts.typeorm: npm run build && npx typeorm -d dist/db/datasource.js
scripts.seed:electronics: cross-env NODE_ENV=development npx ts-node -r tsconfig-paths/register src/scripts/seed-electronics.ts
scripts.seed:furniture: cross-env NODE_ENV=development npx ts-node -r tsconfig-paths/register src/scripts/seed-furniture.ts
scripts.seed:homeDecor: cross-env NODE_ENV=development npx ts-node -r tsconfig-paths/register src/scripts/seed-homeDecor.ts
scripts.seed:blog: cross-env NODE_ENV=development npx ts-node -r tsconfig-paths/register src/scripts/seed-blog.ts
scripts.seed:admin: cross-env NODE_ENV=development npx ts-node -r tsconfig-paths/register src/scripts/seed-admin.ts
scripts.seed:all: npm run seed:admin && npm run seed:blog && npm run seed:furniture && npm run seed:electronics && npm run seed:homeDecor
scripts.seed:prod:admin: cross-env NODE_ENV=production npx ts-node -r tsconfig-paths/register src/scripts/seed-admin.ts
scripts.seed:prod:blog: cross-env NODE_ENV=production npx ts-node -r tsconfig-paths/register src/scripts/seed-blog.ts
scripts.seed:prod:furniture: cross-env NODE_ENV=production npx ts-node -r tsconfig-paths/register src/scripts/seed-furniture.ts
scripts.seed:prod:electronics: cross-env NODE_ENV=production npx ts-node -r tsconfig-paths/register src/scripts/seed-electronics.ts
scripts.seed:prod:homeDecor: cross-env NODE_ENV=production npx ts-node -r tsconfig-paths/register src/scripts/seed-homeDecor.ts
scripts.seed:prod:all: npm run seed:prod:admin && npm run seed:prod:blog && npm run seed:prod:furniture && npm run seed:prod:electronics && npm run seed:prod:homeDecor
